justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted both initial and revised time preferences without any issues.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent successfully found an alternative time after the initial request was unavailable and offered it to the user.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The conversation was efficient, with the agent understanding and responding appropriately in each turn without unnecessary questions or redundant API calls.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, leading to a successful booking without any friction points.
